programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: (Live) The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: France boast the most complete squad in the world, Sadio Mané is Senegal's superstar, and we check out host city Monterrey.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Remarkable Places To Eat S3
programme.desc: Leading chefs take host Fred Sirieix to experience the restaurants where they genuinely love to eat and explore what goes into making them so special.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-Show
programme.desc: (Live) Pre-Show for FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: (Live) The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S7
programme.desc: Sloppy is on babysitting duty with the Triangle Alien's pet, but things quickly go south when he forgets some important rules. Cherry enters a skateboard competition but doesn't believe she has the skills to win. Sloppy invents a tool for her board to help. Will she use the device to cheat her way to the top or can she overcome her fears to win it her way?

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Pocoyo S4
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) Pocoyo is a curious, fun-loving, friendly toddler who's always into something new whether he's on a quest with his friends in outer space or just cleaning up his blocks, every day is an adventure.

programme.title: Bluey: Sr2
programme.desc: Imaginative Australian blue heeler puppy Bluey and little sister Bingo love devising elaborate games to try out adult roles and explore their world. Series 2 introduces more of Bluey and Bingo's family and friends, and looks at Bandit and Chilli's relationship with their girls as they juggle work and childcare.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S9
programme.desc: A little pig named Peppa and George have journeys everyday with their family and friends.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S7
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) Super BOOMi follows an animated bear and his friends as they learn and play in a virtual reality game universe.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S7

programme.title: Curious George S13
programme.desc: Follows the mischievous adventures of a Monkey by the name of George.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Follow five fun-loving penguins—Nugget, Pancake, Looph, Brinicle, and Flutter—living life to the fullest on their very own remote iceberg. Comedic adventures see the colony facing everyday challenges in their frosty world and learning invaluable lessons about friendship, teamwork, and self-discovery.

programme.title: Johnny Test S5
programme.desc: The adventures of average suburban boy Johnny Test, who wittingly plays test subject for his genius twin sisters' various experiments, reluctantly fighting evil villains in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark S2
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: Viking Skool
programme.desc: Three young students, Erik, Ylva and Arni, embark on challenging and thrilling adventures while they train to become glorious Viking warriors.

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: The Series
programme.desc: The series stars two new protagonists, Liko and Roy, who team up with the Rising Volt Tacklers, a group of adventurers that explore the Pokmon world and visit various regions. As they do, they are pursued by the Explorers, a mysterious organization seeking Liko's pendant for unknown reasons.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: In Singapore, 1 in 12 live with chronic pain, mostly women. I Am Living With Pain follows three young women fighting invisible illness, love, work, family and hope.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026
programme.desc: A friendly meetup takes a dangerous turn when a young man brandishes a knife to extort money from his friend. Watch how officers from Tanglin Division, working closely with ground teams, swiftly apprehend the suspect and ensured that justice is served.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Luka Modric is a World Cup specialist, Cape Verde are one of the smallest ever nations to qualify for the World Cup, and we look at host city Atlanta.6.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: A brand-new lifestyle and cooking show with chef-turned-farmer Julius Roberts, A Taste of the Country shows how a wonderful change-of-life plan comes together. Over a glorious summer of hard work and fantastic food, the series presents a sun-soaked escape to the country along with delicious, inspiring recipes you can try in your kitchen... wherever you live!

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S2
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: When a rival chef accuses Aunty Lee of stealing her prized Ayam Curry recipe, Aunty Lee is branded a thief. Determined to clear her name, she agrees to face off with the formidable Aunty Li.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into the Gobi Desert with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: Nick Knowles returns for a truly spectacular adventure, this time in the most desolate place on earth, the Gobi Desert. At five times the size of the UK, with the smallest population on earth, Mongolia is vast and remote and the stunning wilderness of the Gobi covers a third of the country.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Day Express
programme.desc: Match Day Express brings you the goals, the plays, and the heroes of all 104 matches of the FIFA World Cup 2026!

programme.title: Elsbeth S2
programme.desc: Astute but unconventional attorney Elsbeth Tascioni returns to solve more cases alongside the NYPD.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: John Torode finds himself in the world's most densely populated region this week, The Las Vegas of Asia: Macau. As a former Portuguese colony, influences on Macanese cuisine come from all over the globe, and it's with this in mind that John finds himself baking and then tucking in to one of the spiciest dishes he's come across thus far: African Chicken.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing S1
programme.desc: Maggie returns to Boston prepared to deal with the consequences of her professional actions. But a secret is revealed that causes her to question her life in the city. Returning to Sullivan's Crossing, Maggie is forced to face feelings of disappointment and rejection that ultimately lead her to confront Sully about her painful past and make a difficult choice.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Dr Shen and Ah Yoke have an emotional encounter that leads to him calling off the wedding. Zara feels all hope is lost when Adina tells her how difficult it is to get her marriage annulled. Emily learns something from Celia about Jessica's mother.

programme.title: The Contenders 26
programme.desc: Bruno Fernandes is Portugal's assist king, 2022 hosts Qatar return, and we look at World Cup innovations.

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Georgia
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver embarks on a culinary journey through Georgia, exploring Tbilisi's lively markets and the picturesque Kakheti wine region. He learns from local chefs, indulges in traditional dishes like Khinkali and Chakapuli, and participates in a festive Supra feast. Inspired by Georgia's unique cuisine at the crossroads of East and West, Jamie returns home to create his own Georgian-inspired Sunday roast.

programme.title: The Catch
programme.desc: In this brand new, adventurous and mouth-watering series FOUR of Singapore's top chefs swap their high-society-city kitchens for Western Australia's rugged landscapes and stunning food producing regions teaming up with 4 West Australian chefs to actually catch the produce. Let the culinary culture clash commence!

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Elysha from 128 Circle moderates a tense press conference between Aunty Lee and her rival, Aunty Li — but the situation quickly spirals when Aunty Li throws down a do-or-die challenge.

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends
programme.desc: Going a little out of the Southeast Asian territory, we take on the challenge of exploring Hong Kong on a budget! Doubling the travel duration & budget, will Georgina be able to make the best of her 5D4N trip with 1,200? From savouring snacks like Lao Po Bing and Bolo Buns in the city to marveling at nature sites at Sharp Island, let's explore Hong Kong in the first of this 2-part series!

programme.desc: Match Day Express brings you the goals, the plays, and the heroes of all 104 matches of the FIFA World Cup 2026!

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: Thanks to Macau's colonial history and casino bolstered wealth, it's become the ideal venue for John Torode to explore fusion cookery in the most exclusive venues this vibrant city state has to offer. After a shopping trip to the bustling markets with Chef and writer David Wong, John is shown an elaborate pork dish to die for before ascending to 51st floor of the Ritz Carlton for a bird's eye view of the city and a Michelin star fried rice dish.

programme.desc: Liv, Andy, and Mike are three teens who form the ultra-secret Ghostforce, a squad of superheroes with ghostly powers! With the help of the mysterious Glowboo and an arsenal of high-tech invented by their mentor, Miss Jones, our heroes battle and capture the ghosts that haunt New York City... before racing back to school for their next class!

programme.title: Ainsley's Football Feasts S1
programme.desc: Combining two of the world's greatest passions, Ainsley's Football Feasts stars Britain's favourite TV chef as he serves up mouth-watering food for any sport event.

programme.title: The Cube Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: The Great Nyonya Cook-Off begins disastrously when Aunty Lee is disqualified before the competition even heats up. Can the gang help her reclaim her reputation — and prove who the real master chef is?

programme.title: News Tonight
programme.desc: (Live) The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Border Interceptors
programme.desc: The series follows the work of the men and women who protect Ireland's borders on a daily basis. From dealing with the millions people who travel through Irish airports as they visit the Emerald Isle every year to making sure everything is above board with the millions of tonnes of goods that arrive and leave Irish shores every year.

programme.title: CNA Tech Challenge: Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: How do you make complex technology exciting to watch? Follow CNA producers behind the scenes as they design a reality show that makes tech like drones and robots engaging and accessible.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: This is where it all started for John 20 years ago, and a return to Thailand, the home of his favourite Asian cuisine, has him giddy with delight. Desperate to sample his favourite foods again, John skips delightedly between salad stalls and chicken chefs in the markets of Bangkok, proclaiming with each bite to be amongst the best street cooks in the world.

With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

Every exciting encounter helps Storm, Flash and Rainbow discover the amazing abilities each animal possesses.

programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: In this episode John Torode is in the tropical island paradise of Maldives in the Indian Ocean to explore its two sides: local life and the glossy 5-star resorts. John's first outing takes him to the local island of Huraa. Huraa is in Malé Atholhu, one of the country's 26 atolls. Here he meets Soba, who gives him an introduction to Maldivian cuisine by cooking a typical local dish for him using coconuts, chilies & tuna fish called Mas Fen Dhiya.

programme.desc: 粤剧红鬃烈马改编自京剧经典骨子老戏剧中三击掌平贵别窑平贵回窑等经典名段为观众所熟知讲述的是丞相王允奉旨命三女宝钏抛绣球招亲岂料绣球掷中叫花郎薛平贵王允嫌贫重富要挟退婚王宝钏信守承诺与父抗争最终竟与父三击掌断了父女之情风雨之夜王宝钏奔至山神庙与薛平贵相聚在义兄薛道隆的帮助下俩人在破庙结为夫妻薛平贵揭榜投军降伏西凉進贡之红鬃烈马被封为马步先行回窑与宝钏泣别统军出征后竟失陷西凉夫妻俩人一个寒窑苦侯托鸿雁传书一个望月挂怀梦绕魂牵十八年后薛平贵被封为平西王衣锦荣归路遇王宝钏俩人见面竟不相识几经曲折诠释误会夫妻团圆重诚信守节义贫贱不易志富贵毋相忘传统美德成佳话平贵宝钏百世流芳.

programme.title: Ai, Ai, Cef!
programme.desc: In Ai, Ai, Cef!, kids take over the kitchen as head chefs and go head to head in the ultimate cook-off! But every chef needs an assistant, and in AI, AI, CEF, two stars will join our little chefs in their mission to improve the judges - but with their faces hidden behind masks. Who are these assistant chefs? In each episode, two well-known figures --- actors, singers, influencers, athletes, housing agents and more --- join the show as mystery guest.

programme.title: Makan Viral
programme.desc: Makan Viral is a show where the host will travel to various destinations to test various foods and drinks, while meeting interesting people with interesting stories. The trip itself offers an interesting panoramic view with the opportunity to meet personalities who will share their passion for food and lifestyle.

programme.title: Cinta Bukan Milik Kita
programme.desc: Redza inherits the responsibility of taking care of his household after the death of his father. Azalea, Redza's cousin, continues her toxic relationship with Asran, who is focusing on being a Muay Thai fighter.

programme.title: Bukan Puteri Lindungan Bulan
programme.desc: Farah is unhappy when Zafir is not excited by her surprise announcement. Zakuan bumps into Sabrina and suspects that she needs help.

programme.title: ORIGENE
programme.desc: Dahlia, a KTV hostess with a troubled past, discovers she's the daughter of Fauzah, a famous but terminally ill chef. Torn between resentment and curiosity, Dahlia confronts family, love, and survival. Can she embrace her new identity before it's too late?

programme.title: Mentua
programme.desc: Azizah is furious over Amir's sudden marriage to Emilia, seeing her as the cause of his defiance. Determined to regain control, she issues an ultimatum that could ruin their happiness.

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara's journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: You Know Nothing About Sports
programme.desc: The You Know Nothing series returns with Sherry venturing into sports. She partners with a well-known celebrity to learn a new sport, coached by a celebrated athlete. Host : Sherry Alhadad.

programme.title: 3 Mak Dara

programme.desc: With her secret exposed, Farah pushes the blame to Lara. Lara's patience is running thin when Zafir continues to spend less time with her.

programme.title: Cut Amirah
programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. programme.title: Tekan Minyak
programme.desc: Tekan Minyak is a story that revolves around 5 women who call themselves "The Havana Girls". They all started their friendship when they were young from a religious class and after a short separation, they all unite back and the incidents that happen will be core of Drivers.

programme.title: Seindah Cinta Mutiara
programme.desc: This is the story of Mutiara, a woman who must fight hard to build a better life. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara's journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

programme.title: Cantik Detektif S5

As she scripts, plans, and shoots her own episode, she gains the confidence and skills to become an independent digital storyteller.

programme.title: DNA
programme.desc: A new mum with BPD believes her baby was switched after birth. While others doubt her, her reformed addict husband races to find their real child before time runs out.
